SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW MAURY KING IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC. IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED IN COURT VIA ZOOM BY MICHAEL SHARPLES. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED/GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, ANDREW MAURY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS AMERICA, INC $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,465.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
